channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Mwigulu Launches NBC Dodoma Marathon with High Participation
item.description: The Prime Minister of Tanzania, Mwigulu, is set to officially start the NBC Dodoma Marathon, which has attracted a significant number of participants. The event, which is part of the country's efforts...

item.title: Blood vs Duty: Marcus Dedicates Time to Promote Jalil's Recognition | Episode 78
item.description: The latest episode of 'Blood vs Duty' highlights Marcus Reyes' efforts to elevate the profile of Jalil Abubakar, a key character in the series. The episode, titled 'Episode 78,' focuses on Marcus' com...

item.title: Nigeria's Anthem Change Sparks Debate on National Identity
item.description: The article discusses the controversy surrounding Nigeria's decision to revert to the old national anthem 'Arise, O Compatriots' after its replacement in 2024. It highlights how millions of Nigerians ...

item.title: Tracey Cox's Insights on Modern Relationship Advice and Generational Differences
item.description: The article explores the evolving dynamics of marriage in modern times, contrasting the experiences of midlife women with their mothers' generation. Tracey Cox, a UK sex and relationships expert, crit...

item.title: GOP Concerned Over Trump's Potential Impact on Midterm Elections
item.description: Republican campaign operatives are deeply worried that President Donald Trump's aggressive military actions in Iran could jeopardize the GOP's congressional majorities and 'ruin his second term,' acco...

item.title: Gambling Addiction and Exploitation: A Couple's Tragic Fate
item.description: The article details the harrowing case of Ray and Marlene Kasurinen, a couple allegedly groomed and exploited by the Hellenic Club through predatory gambling practices. It highlights how the club’s ta...

item.title: Mentally Ill Man's Corpse Found Dead in Ondo Sparks Health Concerns
item.description: Residents of Ore, Ondo State, are worried about environmental and public health risks after discovering the corpse of a mentally ill man along the Ore overhead bridge. The body, wrapped in a yellow cl...

item.title: Concept Academy delivers AI Masterclass in Rwanda as Tanzania boosts financial initiatives
item.description: The article highlights key developments in Tanzania and beyond. Concept Academy celebrated a significant achievement by delivering an AI Masterclass in Rwanda, marking progress in technology education...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly suspends TMC MLA Kunal Ghosh over factional conflict
item.description: Trinamool Congress MLA Kunal Ghosh was suspended from the West Bengal Assembly for the remainder of the day after disrupting proceedings by interrupting rebel faction leader Akhruzzaman during a debat...

item.title: Morocco Calls for Probe After Man Dies in Police Custody in Italy
item.description: Morocco's foreign ministry has expressed concern over the death of Abderrahim Fakir, a Moroccan-born individual who died following a police arrest in Bologna, Italy. The incident occurred when officer...

item.title: Quebec Considers Renegotiating Churchill Falls Energy Deal Over Historical Injustices
item.description: The article discusses the potential renegotiation of the Churchill Falls energy deal between Quebec and Newfoundland Labrador, focusing on historical grievances. The Parti Québécois (PQ) has expressed...

item.title: Kenya Power Announces Scheduled Outages in Five Counties on July 23
item.description: Kenya Power has announced planned maintenance outages affecting customers across Nairobi, Kiambu, Nyeri, Kisumu, and Tana River counties on Thursday, July 23. The majority of areas will experience an ...

item.title: Heavy rainfall disrupts Punjab cities, Lahore records 123mm rainfall
item.description: Intermittent heavy rainfall lashed several Punjab cities over the past 24 hours, with Lahore recording 123mm of rain, Gujranwala hitting a record 245mm, and Gujrat logging 95mm. The Provincial Disaste...

item.title: Lhuillier Group Expands into Real Estate Sector
item.description: The Lhuillier Group, a prominent business conglomerate known for its ventures in pawnshops, gold trading, IT-BPM, and call centers, has announced its expansion into the housing sector. This move marks...

item.title: Catherine Scorsese's Unscripted Role in Goodfellas: The Heart of the Film's Iconic Scene
item.description: The article explores the behind-the-scenes story of Catherine Scorsese, Martin Scorsese's mother, who played Tommy DeVito's mother in 'Goodfellas' (1990). Her role in the iconic late-night dinner scen...

item.title: Passenger faces investigation after stealing flight attendant's uniform
item.description: A passenger has been investigated by airline authorities after allegedly stealing a flight attendant's uniform during a flight. The incident, which occurred on a domestic route, reportedly led to heig...

item.title: Understanding NAPLAN results: Key tips for parents
item.description: NAPLAN results for students in years 3, 5, 7, and 9 are being released, offering insights into their performance in reading, writing, spelling, grammar, punctuation, and numeracy. Parents should appro...

item.title: U.S. Threatens to Attack Iran's Secret Underground Facility Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: The U.S. has threatened to attack Iran's secretive underground facility, Pickaxe Mountain, which is believed to house advanced nuclear centrifuges and enriched uranium stockpiles. Located near the Nat...

item.title: A Thriving Coral Reef Rediscovered in West Africa After 60 Years
item.description: Scientists have rediscovered a healthy coral reef off the coast of Benin, more than 60 years after initial surveys hinted at its existence. The site, classified as a mesophotic coral ecosystem (MCE), ...

item.title: FIR Filed in Goa Over Protest Supporting Cockroach Janta Party
